title: Jungle Cavalcade
director: William C. Ament, Armand Denis, Clyde E. Elliott
writer: Edward Anthony, Frank Buck, Courtney Ryley Cooper
plot: "Frank Buck's Jungle Cavalcade" is a compilation film that consists of footage from three previous Frank Buck expedition films: "Bring 'em Back Alive," "Wild Cargo" and "Fang and Claw." Unlike most compilation films from major stu...
